sources.title: Luca dances quietly (Moving film about living with depression in full length, German films)

metadata.Plot: A young boy experiences an unforgettable seaside summer on the Italian Riviera filled with gelato, pasta and endless scooter rides. Luca shares these adventures with his newfound best friend, but all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: he is a sea monster from another world just below the ocean's surface.
metadata.Writer: Enrico Casarosa, Jesse Andrews, Simon Stephenson
metadata.Actors: Jacob Tremblay, Jack Dylan Grazer, Emma Berman
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 6 wins & 83 nominations total
